name: Support Ticket Triage Pipeline
outcome_goal: Triage support tickets: read, classify priority, draft response, route to team

jobs.label: step_1_read_tickets
jobs.prompt:
## Objective
Read new unprocessed support tickets from the ticketing system.

## Context
- [retrieval] Support ticket queue — filter for unassigned tickets

## Expected Output
- tickets: array of {id, subject, body, sender, created_at}
- count: number

## Done Criteria
- All unprocessed tickets retrieved
- No tickets skipped

jobs.label: step_2_classify
jobs.prompt:
## Objective
Classify each support ticket by priority (P0-P3) and category (billing, technical, feature_request, account, other).

## Expected Output
- classifications: array of {ticket_id, priority: P0|P1|P2|P3, category: string, confidence: number}

## Done Criteria
- Every ticket assigned a priority and category
- Classification confidence above 0.8 for all tickets
- P0 tickets flagged for immediate attention

jobs.label: step_3_validate_classification
jobs.prompt:
## Validation Task
Review the ticket classifications for accuracy. This is a SEPARATE agent from the classifier.

## Rules to Check
- [threshold] No P0 tickets were misclassified as P2/P3 (check severity alignment)
- [required] Every ticket has both priority and category
- [threshold] Average confidence across all classifications >= 0.85

## Expected Output
- pass: boolean
- overrides: array of {ticket_id, original_priority, corrected_priority, reason}
- confidence: number

jobs.label: step_4_draft_responses
jobs.prompt:
## Objective
Draft initial response templates for each ticket based on its classification and content.

## Expected Output
- drafts: array of {ticket_id, subject, body, tone: professional|urgent|friendly}

## Done Criteria
- Response drafted for every ticket
- Tone matches priority (urgent for P0/P1, professional for P2, friendly for P3)
- No template placeholders left unfilled

jobs.label: step_5_route_to_team
jobs.prompt:
## Objective
Route each ticket to the appropriate support team member based on category and priority.

## Expected Output
- assignments: array of {ticket_id, assigned_to, team, reason}
- escalations: array of ticket_ids that need manager attention

## Done Criteria
- All tickets assigned to a team member
- P0 tickets escalated to manager
- No tickets left unassigned
